Nate McGraw's Security Blog

Cybersecurity Writeups by Nate McGraw

Home About Me Github LinkedIn

I’m Nate McGraw, an Offensive Security Certified Professional(OSCP) based out of Charleston, West Virginia. I have a background as a SOC Analyst, a Web Developer, and a Help Desk Analyst which provides me with necessary insight into the modern cybersecurity landscape. My research documented in this blog focuses on understanding Offensive Security techniques at every level: from how they work to how to perform them and how to detect and defend against them.

Collections

Home Lab Series

Follow the progress of my Home Lab including the creation of an OPNSense Firewall, an Active Directory network and a Wazuh SIEM.

CTF Writeups

Here you can find writeups on my progress in CTF’s and similar cybersecurity challenges.
